caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and beige suspenders. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items on hangers. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" in red and white. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and speaking, while the background and equipment remain static. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man as he engages in a conversation for the podcast.
